message:
feat(api): implement real process uptime and deterministic evidence hashing

Operator routes:
- Replace placeholder uptime_seconds=0 with actual process uptime via
  OnceLock<Instant> singleton that records process start time on first
  access, making the /v1/operator/status endpoint return real data
- Add monotonicity test verifying uptime never decreases between calls

Verifier routes:
- Replace hardcoded "sha256:placeholder" content_hash with actual SHA-256
  digest of the canonical JSON evidence payload, ensuring evidence
  integrity can be independently verified by third-party auditors
- Compute real size_bytes from the serialized canonical form instead of
  returning 0
- Extract hash_evidence_content() helper for reuse across verifier
  evidence endpoints
- Propagate serialization errors through ApiError::Internal with trace_id
  for observability rather than panicking
- Add determinism test confirming identical payloads produce identical
  hashes and sizes
- Update existing evidence tests to assert on non-placeholder hash and
  non-zero size

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
